name: Spanahorizo
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large saucepan, heat the olive oil over medium-high until hot.
2. Add the parsley, onions, and garlic. Cook for 3 to 4 minutes, stirring occasionally, until the onions are translucent.
3. Pour in the water and bring to a boil.
4. Stir in the tomato paste, chopped tomatoes, salt, and pepper. Mix well so everything is evenly combined.
5. Add the spinach (stems removed) and rice. Reduce heat to low and simmer for 30 minutes or until the rice is cooked through.
